title: AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 Overview

detail.title: AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 has been released at polycetap.nic.in. Download your admit card for the 25 April polytechnic entrance exam, check steps, direct link, and exam guidelines.

content.text: AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 has been officially released by SBTET Andhra Pradesh, and the download link is now active on the official website polycetap.ap.gov.in for all registered candidates. Candidates appearing for the AP POLYCET 2026 exam on 25 April should immediately download their AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 using their Class 10 hall ticket number or registered mobile number and date of birth, carefully check exam centre, date and time, and take a clear printout to carry along with a valid photo ID on the exam day.
Click Here: Official AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

links.text: Official AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

content.text: SBTET, Andhra Pradesh has issued the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 on 18 April 2026, and the hall ticket download link is now active on the official website polycetap.ap.gov.in. Candidates who have successfully registered for the Andhra Pradesh Polytechnic Common Entrance Test can download their AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 using their Class 10 hall ticket number or mobile number and date of birth.

The AP POLYCET 2026 exam will be held on 25 April 2026 for admission to diploma (polytechnic) courses in engineering and non‑engineering branches across various government and private polytechnic colleges in Andhra Pradesh.
The following table summarises the important dates for AP POLYCET 2026, including the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 release and exam schedule.

rows: Last date to apply (as per notification)
Expected AP POLYCET hall ticket release

sections.heading: Official AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

content.text: The AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 is available only in online mode. No physical hall tickets will be sent by post.

sections.heading: How to Download AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Once the link is activated, candidates can download the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 by following these steps.

items: Visit the official AP POLYCET website: polycetap.nic.in or polycetap.ap.gov.in.
On the homepage, click on the “Print Hall Ticket” or “Download Hall Ticket” link.
Select the appropriate option and enter the required login details, such as: SSC (Class 10) hall ticket number Date of birth OR registered mobile number and year of passing / appearing
OR registered mobile number and year of passing / appearing
Enter the security / captcha code displayed on the screen.
Click on “View & Print Hall Ticket” or “Submit”.
Your AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 will appear on the screen as a PDF.
Download the file and take 2–3 clear printouts (black-and-white or colour) for exam day and future use.

content.text: To access the AP POLYCET admit card 2026, candidates may need any of the following details, as specified on the official website and major education portals.

items: Date of birth (as per SSC records)
Registered mobile number used during application
Year of passing / appearing for Class 10 / qualifying exam

content.text: Ensure that the information you enter matches the data used during registration to avoid login issues.

sections.heading: Details Printed on AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Candidates must carefully verify all data printed on the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 immediately after download.
Typical details available on the admit card include:

items: Date of birth and category (if applicable)
Exam centre name and full address

content.text: If any error is noticed in the hall ticket details (name, photograph, signature, exam centre, etc.), candidates should immediately contact the designated helpline centres or authorities before the exam date.
Candidates must follow all exam-day instructions mentioned on the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026 and in the official guidelines.
On the day of the exam, candidates should carry:

items: A printed copy of the AP POLYCET Hall Ticket 2026
One valid photo ID proof, such as: Aadhaar card School ID card Passport Voter ID PAN card

content.text: Entry may not be permitted without the hall ticket and valid ID.

sections.heading: Items Allowed Inside the Exam Hall

content.text: As per the instructions shared for AP POLYCET 2026, candidates are generally allowed to carry:
Check your admit card and official website for any updated list of allowed items.
The following are usually prohibited inside the exam hall:
Violation of these rules may lead to disqualification, so candidates should follow all instructions strictly.
AP POLYCET 2026 will be conducted in offline mode using OMR sheets with multiple-choice questions.
Key features of the exam pattern are:

items: Negative marking: No negative marking for wrong answers.

content.text: The subject-wise distribution of questions is generally provided in the detailed exam notification and information brochure.
